bio:
I am a husband and a father to three children. I am a licensed professional counselor in the state of Pennsylvania, where I also provide clinical supervision for pre-licensed counselors.

My experience in both counseling and organizational leadership led me to begin Morning Light Counseling as the specific need for the provision of counseling services for men became evident. My passion and focus areas include providing Spiritually-integrated counseling for men struggling with anxiety, depression, anger, addictive behavior, relationship issues, parenting issues, and motivation concerns.
approachBody:
I am a firm and passionate believer in the importance of staying anchored to Gospel truth. As such, my counsel flows out of that belief. My approach blends narrative work with the narrative of the Biblical story.

Reach out!
credentials: Licensed Professional Counselor (LPC), Commonwealth of Pennsylvania
Focused practice: counseling for men, ages 12 and up
quote: If you want to build a ship, don't drum up the men to gather wood, divide the work and give orders. Instead, teach them to yearn for the vast and endless sea.
